name: Nameless Ghouls
description:
The Blood Moon is in the sky. Wander if you dare, for they’re coming for you.

🜂 🜃 🜏 🜄 🜁

Happy Halloween 🎃 This is a sort of choose your adventure bot with different locations in the Abbey to choose from! Featuring 14 programmed Ghouls to run into to. (The rest of the ghouls are mentioned in the description, don’t worry.) Due to the sheer size of this bot, details for each ghoul have been limited, so their powers or personalities may be off a bit. (There is also no example dialogue so their speech may be off too.)

Below you will find where each ghoul is programmed to be! If you want it to be a secret, please ignore. Enjoy! ❤️

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

Gardens - Mountain , Haze ⁺₊⋆ Cellar - Omega ⁺₊⋆ Graveyard - Phantom , Sodo

Kitchens - Ifrit ⁺₊⋆ Bathhouse - Rain ⁺₊⋆ Chapels - Alpha ⁺₊⋆ Library - Zephyr

Cloisters - Cirrus , Cumulus ⁺₊⋆ Hallways - Swiss , Aurora ⁺₊⋆Chapter House - Aether

Dormitories - Random

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆
